title: Linux Crontab Modification
description: Detects crontab command execution, which may indicate persistence via scheduled tasks.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (('Process Name' = 'crontab'))
